title: Arrojadocharis praxeloides
taxonomy: Arrojadocharis praxeloides is a genus in the flowering plant family Aizoaceae. It is native to South Africa, and this genus contains only one species. Arrojadocharis praxeloides is a succulent plant, characterized by its small size and distinctive features. The classification of Arrojadocharis praxeloides is within the family Aizoaceae, which is part of the larger order Caryophyllales. This classification places Arrojadocharis praxeloides among other succulent plants from Africa.
